\tzpentry{ID5451}{Field Strength Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5451 introduces Field Strength Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{F}_{total} = \sum_{i=1}^{N} \left( \kappa \mathbf{r}_i + \sum_{j \neq i} \frac{q_i q_j}{4\pi\epsilon_0 |\mathbf{r}_i - \mathbf{r}_j|^3} (\mathbf{r}_i - \mathbf{r}_j) \right) \end{equation}
